summary: Review notes an incorrect date label for the 3/20/86 recording, with no comments on performance or sound quality
review: The sole reviewer points out that this tape is from March 20 1986 rather than June 20 1986 as listed. No observations are made about the music itself or the audio fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focused on a labeling error; no information on show or recording quality, so rating is conservative and based mainly on the negative sentiment of the correction.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No information provided in the review.
